# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/providers/roleAssignments
    name: [concat('func_', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]
    apiVersion: '2017-09-01'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'Storage Blob Data Owner')]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"

  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/providers/roleAssignments
    name: [concat('func_', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]
    apiVersion: '2017-09-01'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'Key Vault Administrator')]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases/providers/roleAssignments
    name: [concat('func_', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]
    apiVersion: '2017-09-01'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'SQL DB Contributor')]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases', parameters('sqlServerName'), parameters('databaseName'))]"

  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts/providers/roleAssignments
    name: [concat('func_', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]
    apiVersion: '2017-09-01'
    properties:
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat(subscription().id, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'DocumentDB Account Contributor')]"
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      scope: "[resourceId('Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts', parameters('cosmosDBName'))]"

outputs:
  principalId:
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', parameters('functionAppName')), '2018-02-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
